data.body:
Goal:
Remove the beads-compat-status.ts module and its dependents from the codebase. This module was explicitly quarantined by foolery-48c1 as migration debt for the Beads JSONL backend, and the ADR (docs/adr-knots-compatibility.md) promises a follow-up epic to eliminate it. This is that follow-up.

Verification:
1. beads-compat-status.ts and beads-compat-status.test.ts are deleted.
2. bd-update.ts, bd-mutations.ts, bd-queries.ts, beads-backend.ts, beads-jsonl-dto.ts, and memory-manager-commands.ts no longer import from or reference compat-status translation.
3. The Beads JSONL backend reads/writes workflow-native state directly.
4. All existing tests pass.
5. ADR docs/adr-knots-compatibility.md is updated to mark the debt as resolved.

Constraints:
- Ensure no JSONL files on disk become unreadable — add migration logic if existing .jsonl records contain compat-status fields.
- Verify bd-update.ts and bd-mutations.ts (currently outside the backends/ directory) either move into backends/ or lose their compat-status dependency.
data.title: Eliminate quarantined beads-compat-status migration debt
